title: Browse trending tags on the Explore page and filter posts by tag

acceptance_criteria.title: Explore page shows trending tags
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I navigate to the Explore page
When the page loads
Then I should see a list of trending tag chips

acceptance_criteria.title: Clicking a tag filters the posts shown
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on the Explore page
When I click a tag chip
Then I should see filtered posts and the tag should appear selected

acceptance_criteria.title: Explore page shows suggested users
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I navigate to the Explore page
When the page loads
Then I should see a list of users in the People section

title: View home feed with posts and author info

acceptance_criteria.title: Home feed shows posts with author and content
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the home page
When the page loads
Then I should see post cards with author names and post content

acceptance_criteria.title: Posts show timestamp and engagement counts
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the home page
When the page loads
Then I should see timestamps and like counts on post cards

title: Like a post on the home feed

acceptance_criteria.title: Like button toggles active state
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on the home page
When I click the like button on a post
Then the like button should have the active class

title: Bookmark a post on the home feed

acceptance_criteria.title: Bookmark button toggles active state
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on the home page
When I click the bookmark button on a post
Then the bookmark button should have the active class

title: Compose a new post that appears in the feed

acceptance_criteria.title: Composer is present on home page
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the home page
When the page loads
Then I should see the composer textarea and submit button

acceptance_criteria.title: Composing a post adds it to the feed
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on the home page
When I type a post and click submit
Then the new post content should appear in the feed

acceptance_criteria.title: Submitting empty post shows error
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on the home page and the composer is empty
When I click the submit button without typing anything
Then I should see an error message

title: Load additional posts by clicking Load more

acceptance_criteria.title: Load more button appears and loads additional posts
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on the home page
When I click the Load more button
Then more post cards should be visible

title: Toggle between dark and light mode using the theme button in the nav

acceptance_criteria.title: Meta banner is present on every page
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the home page
When the page loads
Then I should see the meta banner with links to the seed and spec

acceptance_criteria.title: Theme toggle button is present in navigation
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the home page
When the page loads
Then I should see a theme toggle button in the navigation

acceptance_criteria.title: Clicking theme toggle switches the active class on html element
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on the home page
When I click the theme toggle button
Then the html element should have the dark class applied

title: View a user profile with bio, counts, and posts

acceptance_criteria.title: Profile page shows user info and posts
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I click on an author name from the home feed
When the profile page loads
Then I should see the user display name, handle, bio, and their posts

acceptance_criteria.title: Profile page shows follower counts
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I navigate to a user profile page
When the page loads
Then I should see follower and following counts

title: Follow and unfollow a user from their profile page

acceptance_criteria.title: Follow button is present on profile pages
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I navigate to a user profile page
When the page loads
Then I should see a follow button

acceptance_criteria.title: Clicking follow updates button to Following state
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on a user profile page
When I click the follow button
Then the button should display Following

title: Search for posts using a keyword and see results update live

acceptance_criteria.title: Search input is present on search page
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I navigate to the search page
When the page loads
Then I should see a search input field

acceptance_criteria.title: Typing a keyword shows matching posts
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on the search page
When I type a keyword that matches post content
Then I should see matching post results

acceptance_criteria.title: Searching with no matches shows empty state message
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on the search page
When I type a query that has no matching posts
Then I should see a no results message

title: View a single post with its full thread context

acceptance_criteria.title: Post detail page shows post content and author
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I click on a post from the home feed
When the post detail page loads
Then I should see the post content and author information
